known_threat_surface: Malicious or substituted CAD/EDA toolchain component
prior_source_category: EDA/CAD toolchain and electronics supply-chain attack literature
evidence_requirement: Tool/image digest; installation manifest; runner provenance; transformation lineage; source-to-bitstream digest chain
disposition: covered as tool-environment identity and transformation-lineage records

known_threat_surface: Constraint manipulation or unsafe tool-flow configuration
prior_source_category: FPGA CAD attack-surface and tool-flow manipulation literature
evidence_requirement: Constraint digest; review approval; option snapshot; target-device record; route/checkpoint lineage
disposition: covered as configuration and implementation-state records

known_threat_surface: Intermediate netlist, checkpoint, or implementation-state manipulation
evidence_requirement: Input-output digest chain; synthesis or implementation log; checkpoint digest; release attestation
disposition: covered as transformation integrity and build-lineage records

known_threat_surface: Report, waiver, or signoff evidence manipulation
evidence_requirement: Report digest; generator command; timestamp; waiver/exception record; source-to-report lineage
disposition: covered as report integrity and provenance records

known_threat_surface: Bitstream substitution, replay, or direct modification
evidence_requirement: Bitstream digest; signature where configured; release manifest; key-handling record; programming log
disposition: covered as bitstream identity, confidentiality, authority, and lineage records

known_threat_surface: Unauthorized signing, release promotion, or artifact publication
prior_source_category: Software/hardware supply-chain provenance and signing guidance
evidence_requirement: Signer identity; release approval; release manifest; workflow identity; service-account identity; attestation
disposition: covered as release/signing authority and release-provenance records

known_threat_surface: Programming target spoofing or unauthorized programming
prior_source_category: FPGA guidance on programming, configuration authentication, update, and deployment records
evidence_requirement: Target identity; programmer identity; programming log; readback/status log; rollback record
disposition: covered as programming-target authority and deployment-evidence records

known_threat_surface: IP-package identity, IP metadata, or IP-XACT manipulation
evidence_requirement: Provider identity; package digest; dependency/IP metadata manifest; source digest; access log
disposition: covered as source/IP identity, source integrity, confidentiality, and constraint subcases

known_threat_surface: Side-channel leakage, invasive extraction, cryptanalysis, or chip-level fault injection
prior_source_category: Runtime, physical, and device-level FPGA attack literature
catalog_record_or_decision: out of scope unless the development flow creates or releases the enabling artifact
evidence_requirement: Not applicable to the core toolchain artifact-evidence tuple; use source, report, bitstream, or release records only when a toolchain artifact is involved
disposition: excluded from core catalog by scope rule

catalog_record_or_decision: scope extension; candidate subcase unless the evaluated flow includes partial-reconfiguration artifacts
evidence_requirement: Partition/persona manifest; partial-bitstream digest; compatibility record; deployment log
disposition: deferred as future scope because the core representative flow does not evaluate a partial-reconfiguration corpus
